description: Read, preview, render, and write Vestaboard messages from the terminal, including character-code lookup for precise board output.

novel_features.name: Board preview
novel_features.description: See what's on your Vestaboard right now as readable text instead of a raw integer grid.

novel_features.name: Character-code table
novel_features.description: Print the full Vestaboard character-code table (code to glyph) for hand-building a character-array message.
